glossaryEntries.definition: Forces the target to launch its Basic Attack against the dragon that applied Taunt.

abilities.name: Fiery Bonds
abilities.rawDescription: Each round: 25% chance to afflict Taunt on three enemies in any lane for two rounds, doubled to 50% against Burned targets. Even-numbered rounds: deal Physical Damage to one enemy within adjacency, Damage Rate +120%. Taunt roll scope is not stated.

activationRoll.description: Taunt chance applies to three targets, but shared versus per-target roll scope is not stated.

targetStatusConditionalChances.description: Chance is doubled against a Burned target.

activationRoll.description: Shared versus per-target Taunt roll is unresolved.

conditionalMultipliers.description: Chance is doubled against a Burned target.

unresolvedQuestions: Fiery Bonds shared-roll versus per-target Taunt checks.

abilities.name: Warrior's Resilience
abilities.rawDescription: At Level 16+ and deployed in Vanguard: Vhagar Damage Received -8%; Left Flank ally Tactical Damage Dealt +16%.

abilities.name: Ancestral Shield
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Round 1 for three rounds: reduce Physical and Tactical Damage Received. Start of Round 4 until end of combat: increase Recovery Received.

abilities.name: Battle Leader
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat until end of combat: select one ally in any lane, preferring Right Flank with fallback, and increase Physical Damage Dealt excluding Basic Attacks.
unresolvedQuestions: Target selection when a preferred flank is absent.

abilities.name: Eclipse Cover
abilities.rawDescription: Rounds 3 through 7 inclusive: one shared ranked activation roll. On success, grant Advantage to the ally with most current troops and Weakened to the enemy with most current troops for two rounds. Prose rounds L1 to 18%; table shows 17.5%.

activationRoll.description: One shared activation roll applies both effects.

abilities.name: Blazing Onslaught
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Round 1 for three rounds: increase Fire Damage Received on one enemy preferring Left Flank, and Physical Damage Received excluding Basic Attacks on one enemy preferring Right Flank. Effects select independently; distinct targets are not required.
unresolvedQuestions: Target selection when a preferred flank is absent.

abilities.name: Skyward Titan
abilities.rawDescription: Each round: 30% chance to gain one Bulwark stack, max five, until end of combat. Each stack increases Strength and reduces Physical/Tactical Damage Received. When Vhagar gains the third Bulwark stack, deal Physical Damage to one enemy in the same lane.

activationRoll.description: One chance to gain a Bulwark stack each round.

notes: Each stack increases Strength and reduces Physical/Tactical Damage Received; defense L1 table value is -2.5%.

stackTransitionTrigger.description: Triggers when Vhagar gains the third Bulwark stack, not continuously while at three or more stacks.

unresolvedQuestions: Bulwark stack acquisition and exact trigger ordering.

notes: Vhagar command, trait, affinities, observation state, and five Habits were normalized from screenshot evidence.
Fiery Bonds Taunt roll scope remains unknown because the screenshot does not state shared or per-target checks.
Skyward Titan damage is modeled as a transition into the third Bulwark stack, not a continuous at-three-stacks effect.
Observation values are account-preview values and are not canonical base stats.

rawDescriptions.rawDescription: Each round: 25% chance to afflict Taunt on three enemies in any lane for two rounds, doubled to 50% against Burned targets. Even-numbered rounds: deal Physical Damage to one enemy within adjacency, Damage Rate +120%. Taunt roll scope is not stated.
At Level 16+ and deployed in Vanguard: Vhagar Damage Received -8%; Left Flank ally Tactical Damage Dealt +16%.
Start of Round 1 for three rounds: reduce Physical and Tactical Damage Received. Start of Round 4 until end of combat: increase Recovery Received.
Start of Combat until end of combat: select one ally in any lane, preferring Right Flank with fallback, and increase Physical Damage Dealt excluding Basic Attacks.

Rounds 3 through 7 inclusive: one shared ranked activation roll. On success, grant Advantage to the ally with most current troops and Weakened to the enemy with most current troops for two rounds. Prose rounds L1 to 18%; table shows 17.5%.

Start of Round 1 for three rounds: increase Fire Damage Received on one enemy preferring Left Flank, and Physical Damage Received excluding Basic Attacks on one enemy preferring Right Flank. Effects select independently; distinct targets are not required.

Each round: 30% chance to gain one Bulwark stack, max five, until end of combat. Each stack increases Strength and reduces Physical/Tactical Damage Received. When Vhagar gains the third Bulwark stack, deal Physical Damage to one enemy in the same lane.
